case_title: JOHN B. VLAHOS VS. HORCE NASH et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VLAHOS, JOHN B. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NASH, HORCE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1288 MISSION STREET, UNIT 336, S.F. CALIFORNIA 94103 COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $19.33 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF VLAHOS, JOHN B.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF VLAHOS, JOHN B. SERVED JUL-16-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NASH, HORCE
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF VLAHOS, JOHN B. AS TO DEFENDANT NASH, HORCE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT NASH, HORCE
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VLAHOS, JOHN B. AS TO DEFENDANT NASH, HORCE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VLAHOS, JOHN B. AS TO DEFENDANT NASH, HORCE
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT NASH, HORCE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT NASH, HORCE
